blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
